message:
fix(fnx): resolve port endpoints to parent nodes in cycle scorer

Bug: endpoint_node_index incorrectly assumed IrPortId was the parent
node index. IrPortId is an index into ir.ports, and the actual parent
node must be looked up via IrPort::node.

Fix: use endpoint.resolved_node_id(ports) which correctly resolves
both Node and Port endpoints to their underlying node index.

Added test: port_endpoints_resolve_to_parent_nodes verifies edges
between ports are correctly analyzed (marked as bridges in this case).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
